/* eslint-disable @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any, react-hooks/set-state-in-effect, @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars -- Existing Admin Users page predates strict lint cleanup; Phase 12 preserves behavior while adding signer-profile UI route contracts/helpers. */
Signer Profile Phase 12 UI wiring contract:

- Create-user UI must include firstName, lastName, displayName, username, email, phoneExtension, faxNumber, signatureBlockName, locked, inactive, twoFactorPhone, twoFactorDisabled, and twoFactorPendingSetup in the payload sent to /api/admin/users/create.
- Edit-user signer/contact/status UI must use PATCH /api/admin/users/signer-profile with preview/apply behavior.
- The signer-profile edit route is separate from lockout, password reset, failed-login clear, role assignment, and permission override routes.
- The Users admin table should show derived signer status Complete/Missing Fields and 2FA status Enabled/Disabled/Missing Phone/Pending Setup.
- This UI phase must not wire production document-generation signer validation.
- create/edit fields: firstName, lastName, displayName, username, email, phoneExtension, faxNumber, signatureBlockName, locked, inactive, twoFactorPhone, twoFactorDisabled
- table indicators: signer profile Complete/Missing Fields, Locked, Inactive, Failed-login locked, 2FA Enabled/Disabled/Missing Phone/Pending Setup
- edit form should show specific missing signer fields

Preview-only restore safety: this page does not execute restores, write Clio data, send email, generate documents, or change the print queue.

Read-only preview for cleaning up old scheduled-backup log noise.  This section shows log health, old-error presence, file size, line count, and proposed archive names only.  It does not archive, truncate, move, delete, restore data, send alerts, call Clio, generate documents, or change the print queue.

Read-only alert state from the monitored backup wrapper.  This panel shows the last alert and duplicate-suppression state only.  It does not send email, edit alert state, restore data, delete backups, run retention cleanup, call Clio, generate documents, or change the print queue.

Read-only visibility for the scheduled local database/index backup system.  This section reads backup status, retention policy, and recent backup logs only.  It does not delete backups, execute restores, call Clio, send email, generate documents, or change the print queue.

Read-only comparison preview for two backup manifests.  This comparison does not restore data, delete backups, run retention cleanup, call Clio, send email, generate documents, or change the print queue.

Read-only audit report generated from the backup metadata already loaded on this page.  Copy and CSV export are client-side only.  This section does not create server-side export files, restore data, delete backups, run retention cleanup, call Clio, send email, generate documents, or change the print queue.

patchRules: Patch only runtime code in the next phase; do not alter DOCX files.
Add signer selector/readiness to the Generate Documents flow only after exact UI/API targets are selected.
Selected signer should default to the current generating admin user when available, while allowing another eligible admin user to be selected.
Signer eligibility should use signer completeness and inactive/locked status; incomplete selected signer should block only templates that require signer fields.
Initial Billing Letter static approved header/signature bypass must remain preserved until separately changed.
Do not add legacy token compatibility layers.
Do not alter Phase 18L Initial Billing Letter DOCX or shared letterhead-simple DOCX.
